summary: Comprehensive testing of SaintSal Labs v11 features: CookinCards (Pokemon TCG API search, eBay pricing, trending market data, cert verification), Real Estate (listings with coordinates, Grid/Map toggle, property detail view), Career Suite (14-status Kanban tracker). Backend: 22/23 tests passed (96%). Frontend: All critical flows working.

minor.issue: Intermittent empty results during server reload - resolved on retry

issues: Valuation/rent estimate section not visible in initial view - may need scroll or API call

context_for_next_testing_agent: All major features tested and working: CookinCards search returns real Pokemon TCG API data with images and TCGPlayer prices, Deals tab shows live Tavily trending articles, Real Estate search returns 20 properties with Grid/Map toggle, property detail view shows address/price/beds/baths/sqft, Career Suite Tracker shows 14-status Kanban board. Backend API /api/career/v2/tracker confirmed 14 statuses: wishlist, networking, saved, applied, phone_screen, assessment, interview_scheduled, interview_completed, reference_check, offer_received, negotiating, job_won, rejected, withdrawn.

CookinCards.search: ✓ POST /api/cards/search returns cards with images, set names, prices from Pokemon TCG API
CookinCards.price: ✓ POST /api/cards/price returns ebay_listings and tcgplayer prices via Tavily
CookinCards.cert_verify: ✓ POST /api/cards/verify-cert returns verification_url and search_results for PSA/BGS
CookinCards.collection: ✓ GET/POST /api/cards/collection works for anonymous users with local save
CookinCards.frontend_search: ✓ Search for 'Charizard' shows 12 cards with real images and TCGPlayer prices ($339.59-$755.96)
CookinCards.frontend_deals: ✓ Deals tab shows live trending market articles from Tavily

WebsiteIntel.crawl: ✓ POST /api/studio/website-intel triggers crawl and returns brand_extraction data

RealEstate.listings: ✓ GET /api/realestate/listings/sale returns listings with latitude, longitude, price fields
RealEstate.frontend_search: ✓ Search for 'Austin, TX' shows 20 properties with Grid|Map toggle
RealEstate.frontend_detail: ✓ Clicking property card shows detail view with Back button, address, price, beds/baths/sqft

CareerSuite.frontend_kanban: ✓ Tracker tab renders Kanban columns with job cards
